## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/doctor.py --quick`
- [ ] `python scripts/wiki_cli.py lint`
- [ ] Docs or README updated if behavior changed

## Wiki and docs impact

- [ ] No wiki/schema changes
- [ ] Wiki/docs updated to match the change

## Local data safety

- [ ] No personal paths
- [ ] No `.local.json` files
- [ ] No user-specific global config changes

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that deserves extra attention, tradeoff notes, or follow-up work.
